services.name: Acne & acne scarring
services.description:
Acne and acne scars can affect skin texture, confidence and overall skin health. At our London aesthetic clinic, we offer an advanced regenerative skin treatment combining PRP (platelet-rich plasma) and autologous exosome therapy to improve acne, stimulate skin healing and reduce acne scars.

This innovative treatment uses the body's own regenerative capacity to repair damaged skin tissue, improve collagen production and restore healthier skin structure.

PRP and autologous exosomes work synergistically to activate the skin’s natural healing mechanisms, helping to reduce inflammation, improve skin texture and support long-term skin regeneration.

This treatment is ideal for patients experiencing:

• active acne and inflammatory acne
• acne scars and uneven skin texture
• enlarged pores and rough skin surface
• post-acne pigmentation
• skin damage caused by previous acne breakouts

Unlike traditional acne treatments that focus only on controlling symptoms, PRP and autologous Exosome therapy support deep biological skin regeneration, improving the skin from within.
services.details:
Platelet-rich plasma (PRP) is obtained from a small sample of the patient’s blood and contains highly concentrated growth factors that stimulate tissue repair and collagen production.

Autologous exosomes are powerful biological signalling molecules that enhance cellular communication and accelerate tissue regeneration.

When PRP and autologous exosomes are used together, they help to:

• activate skin repair and regeneration
• stimulate collagen production
• improve acne scars and skin texture
• reduce inflammation associated with acne
• restore healthier skin function

Over time, the skin becomes smoother, stronger and more balanced.
benefits: This regenerative acne treatment offers multiple skin benefits by enhancing the skin’s natural repair processes.  Key benefits include:  • Reduces acne inflammation • Improves the appearance of acne scars • Stimulates collagen and elastin production • Enhances skin regeneration and healing • Improves skin texture and smoothness • Reduces enlarged pores • Supports healthier, more balanced skin • Natural regenerative treatment using the body's own biological factors  PRP combined with autologous exosome therapy is considered one of the most advanced non-surgical treatments for acne scars and skin regeneration in modern aesthetic medicine.
services.preparation:
To prepare your skin for PRP and autologous exosome acne treatment, please follow these recommendations.

48 hours before treatment:

• Avoid alcohol
• Avoid anti-inflammatory medication such as ibuprofen or aspirin unless medically required
• Avoid blood-thinning supplements including fish oil and vitamin E

24 hours before treatment:

• Avoid retinol, acids and strong exfoliating skincare products
• Avoid sun exposure and tanning
• Avoid other facial treatments in the treatment area

Please inform your practitioner if you:

• have active skin infections
• are taking prescription acne medication such as isotretinoin
• have autoimmune conditions
• are pregnant or breastfeeding

A full skin consultation will be performed before treatment to ensure safety and the most appropriate treatment plan.
services.aftercare:
Following PRP and autologous exosome therapy, proper aftercare supports optimal skin regeneration.

For the first 24 hours:

• Avoid touching or rubbing the treated area
• Avoid makeup if possible
• Avoid intense exercise
• Avoid heat exposure such as saunas and steam rooms

For the first 48 hours:

• Avoid exfoliating skincare products
• Avoid direct sun exposure
• Use gentle, hydrating skincare

Temporary redness, mild swelling or sensitivity may occur as the skin begins the regeneration process. Little to no downtime.

services.name: Cellulite (thighs, buttocks, abdomen)
services.description:
Advanced Non-Surgical Treatment for Smoother, Firmer Skin

Cellulite is a common skin concern affecting many women, typically appearing on the thighs, buttocks and abdomen. It occurs when fat deposits push through the connective tissue beneath the skin, creating the characteristic dimpled or “orange peel” appearance.

At our London aesthetic clinic, we offer advanced non-surgical cellulite treatment designed to improve skin texture, stimulate collagen production and support skin tightening in areas affected by cellulite.

Our treatment focuses on improving circulation, stimulating tissue regeneration and strengthening the skin structure to reduce the visible appearance of cellulite while enhancing overall skin quality.

This treatment is suitable for cellulite affecting:

• thighs
• buttocks
• abdomen
• hips
• other areas with uneven skin texture

The procedure supports gradual skin improvement, resulting in smoother, firmer and more even-looking skin.
services.details:
Cellulite treatment is typically performed as a course of sessions in order to achieve the best and most long-lasting results.

In most cases, a series of 3 to 6 treatments is recommended. In some situations, additional sessions may be required depending on the starting condition of the skin, the severity of cellulite and the individual goals of the patient.

Each treatment session generally focuses on one specific body area.

A single body area may include:

• thighs
• buttocks
• abdomen
• hips

For treatment planning purposes, each of these regions is considered one body area per treatment session. If multiple areas are treated, additional sessions may be recommended.

Because cellulite varies significantly from person to person, every treatment programme is fully personalised. The treatment protocol is designed based on:

• the starting condition of the skin
• the degree of cellulite present
• the size of the treatment area
• the desired aesthetic outcome

For this reason, a consultation is always required before beginning cellulite treatment. During the consultation, the practitioner will assess the treatment areas and create a personalised treatment plan tailored to your goals.

Gradual improvement in skin texture, firmness and smoothness is typically seen throughout the course of treatment sessions.
benefits: Cellulite treatment offers multiple benefits for improving skin texture and body contour.  Key benefits include:  • Reduces the visible appearance of cellulite • Improves skin texture and smoothness • Stimulates collagen and elastin production • Enhances skin firmness and elasticity • Improves circulation in treated areas • Supports skin tightening • Non-surgical body treatment • Minimal recovery time  With a personalised treatment plan, patients can achieve progressive improvement in the appearance of cellulite and overall skin quality.
services.preparation:
To achieve the best results from your cellulite treatment, please follow these guidelines before your appointment.

48 hours before treatment:

• Avoid alcohol
• Stay well hydrated
• Avoid anti-inflammatory medication unless medically necessary

24 hours before treatment:

• Avoid intense physical exercise
• Avoid other body treatments in the treatment area
• Avoid excessive sun exposure

Please inform your practitioner if you:

• are pregnant or breastfeeding
• have skin infections or inflammation in the treatment area
• have medical conditions affecting circulation or skin healing

A consultation will be carried out to assess the treatment areas and create an appropriate treatment plan.
services.aftercare:
Proper aftercare will help support skin recovery and maximise treatment results.

For the first 24 hours:

• Avoid intense exercise
• Avoid saunas, steam rooms and excessive heat
• Avoid alcohol
• Stay well hydrated

For the first 48 hours:

• Avoid body massages in the treated area
• Avoid other aesthetic treatments on the same area
• Continue to drink plenty of water

Mild redness or sensitivity in the treated area may occur and typically resolves within a short period.

services.name: Cheek Volume Restoration
services.description:
Cheek volume restoration with dermal fillers is an advanced non-surgical aesthetic treatment designed to restore lost volume in the mid-face, enhance facial contours and create a naturally lifted appearance.

As we age, the cheeks gradually lose volume due to the natural breakdown of collagen, fat and structural support within the skin. This volume loss can lead to a flatter mid-face, deeper nasolabial folds and a tired or hollow appearance.

Dermal fillers for cheeks work by restoring volume in the mid-face area, lifting the surrounding tissues and improving overall facial balance. The treatment enhances the cheek structure while maintaining a soft, natural look.

At our London aesthetic clinic, cheek fillers are carefully placed to restore youthful contours, improve facial harmony and achieve elegant, subtle rejuvenation.

Cheek volume restoration is ideal for patients who want to:

• Restore mid-face volume
• Improve cheek definition and contour
• Lift sagging tissues in the mid-face
• Reduce the appearance of nasolabial folds
• Achieve a natural, refreshed look without surgery
services.details:
Dermal fillers used for cheek enhancement are typically made from hyaluronic acid, a naturally occurring substance in the body that helps maintain skin hydration and volume.

During the treatment, carefully selected dermal fillers are injected into strategic points in the mid-face to restore lost volume and support the facial structure.

This technique helps to:

• rebuild the natural cheek contour
• lift the mid-face area
• improve overall facial proportions

Results are visible immediately after treatment, with optimal results appearing once any minor swelling settles.
benefits: Cheek fillers offer both aesthetic and structural benefits by restoring the foundation of the face.  Key benefits include:  • Restores lost volume in the mid-face • Enhances natural cheek contour and definition • Creates a subtle non-surgical cheek lift • Improves facial symmetry and balance • Softens nasolabial folds and smile lines • Provides natural-looking facial rejuvenation • Immediate visible results • Long-lasting results (typically 12–18 months)  Cheek fillers are often considered one of the most effective treatments for non-surgical facial rejuvenation, as restoring mid-face volume can improve multiple signs of ageing at once.

services.name: Pigmentation  Treatment
services.description:
Advanced Regenerative Treatment for Pigmentation and Uneven Skin Tone

Hyperpigmentation is a common skin concern that appears as dark patches or uneven skin tone caused by excess melanin production. It may develop due to sun exposure, hormonal changes, acne marks or skin inflammation.

At our London aesthetic clinic, we offer an advanced hyperpigmentation treatment combining PRP (platelet-rich plasma), autologous exosome therapy obtained through MCT technology and targeted Cryo-Pen cryotherapy.

This innovative regenerative approach helps reduce pigmentation while supporting skin repair and long-term skin rejuvenation. By combining regenerative medicine with precise pigmentation treatment, we are able to improve both the appearance and the underlying health of the skin.

This treatment is suitable for:

• sun damage and sun spots
• post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation
• uneven skin tone
• pigmentation after acne
• age spots and skin discoloration

The combination of PRP, autologous exosomes and Cryo-Pen therapy works to gradually brighten the skin, stimulate collagen production and restore a more even complexion.
services.details:
This treatment combines regenerative medicine with targeted pigmentation therapy.

PRP (platelet-rich plasma) is obtained from a small sample of the patient’s blood and contains powerful growth factors that stimulate skin repair and collagen production.

Using advanced MCT technology, PRP can be further processed to obtain autologous exosomes, which are microscopic biological messengers that support cellular communication, tissue regeneration and skin renewal.

Autologous exosomes help:

• stimulate collagen and elastin production
• support skin regeneration
• improve skin texture and tone
• accelerate healing processes in the skin

Cryo-Pen therapy is a precise cryotherapy device that uses controlled cold temperatures to target pigmentation and superficial skin lesions. The cold energy helps break down pigmented cells, allowing the body to gradually eliminate them and replace them with healthier skin.

When combined, PRP, autologous exosomes and Cryo-Pen therapy work synergistically to:

• reduce visible pigmentation
• stimulate skin regeneration
• restore healthier skin structure
• improve skin brightness and clarity
benefits: This regenerative pigmentation treatment offers multiple benefits for improving skin tone and skin quality.  Key benefits include:  • Reduces hyperpigmentation and dark spots • Improves uneven skin tone • Stimulates collagen production • Enhances skin regeneration and healing • Improves overall skin texture and brightness • Supports long-term skin repair • Non-surgical pigmentation treatment • Minimal recovery time  By stimulating the skin’s natural regenerative capacity, this treatment helps restore healthier and more radiant skin.

services.name: Laser Hair Removal Consultation
services.description:
Laser hair removal is a safe, effective treatment that uses concentrated light to target and destroy hair follicles, preventing future hair growth. The laser safely emits light that is absorbed by the pigment in the hair, damaging the follicle while leaving surrounding skin unharmed. It is ideal for long-lasting hair reduction on various body areas, including the face, legs, underarms, and bikini line. Benefits include smoother skin, permanent hair reduction, and ingrown hairs. Very easy maintenance in between the laser sessions, which does not affect your social life and holidays plans. Package of 8/10 treatments is required for the best results, as hair grows in different cycles, and the treatment works best when the hair is in the active growth phase. It’s important to follow before & aftercare instructions for optimal results.
Duration of each session from 20min to 1 hour
Results: immediate, visible reduction of the hair
Downtime: Minimal, easy to follow after care instructions

services.description:
Advanced Skin Barrier Repair and Rosacea Treatment

Rosacea is a chronic inflammatory skin condition that typically affects the central areas of the face, including the cheeks, nose, chin and forehead. It is often characterised by persistent redness, visible blood vessels, skin sensitivity and occasional flare-ups resembling acne-like breakouts.

Rosacea can significantly affect skin comfort and confidence, as the skin often becomes reactive, easily irritated and prone to inflammation.

At our London aesthetic clinic, we offer an advanced rosacea treatment protocol combining PRP (platelet-rich plasma) therapy with specialised regenerative mesotherapy designed to calm inflammation, strengthen the skin barrier and restore healthier skin function.

As a clinic specialising in regenerative medicine, our approach focuses on supporting the skin’s natural healing ability rather than simply masking symptoms. PRP helps stimulate skin repair and regeneration, while carefully selected mesotherapy solutions work to calm, nourish and rebalance the skin.

This personalised treatment protocol helps improve skin resilience, reduce redness and support long-term skin health.
services.details:
Rosacea requires a carefully structured and personalised treatment protocol, as the condition can vary significantly from patient to patient.

Treatment typically begins with PRP therapy, obtained from the patient’s own blood. PRP contains powerful growth factors that support tissue repair, reduce inflammation and stimulate natural skin regeneration.

PRP is combined with specialised mesotherapy injections containing carefully selected ingredients designed to calm inflammation, support the skin barrier and restore skin balance.

This combination helps to:

• reduce skin inflammation
• strengthen the skin barrier
• improve skin resilience
• support natural skin regeneration

In many cases, visible improvement can already be observed after the first treatment, as the skin begins to calm and rebalance.

Depending on the severity of rosacea and the starting condition of the skin, a series of 1 to 3 treatments is usually recommended to achieve optimal results.

During the consultation, the practitioner will assess the skin condition and create a personalised rosacea treatment protocol, which may also include lifestyle and nutritional recommendations designed to support the skin from within.
benefits: This regenerative treatment protocol offers multiple benefits for improving rosacea-prone skin and restoring skin balance.  Key benefits include:  • Helps reduce redness and inflammation • Strengthens the skin barrier • Improves skin resilience and tolerance • Supports natural skin regeneration • Calms sensitive and reactive skin • Improves overall skin texture and comfort • Non-surgical regenerative skin treatment • Minimal recovery time  By supporting the skin’s natural repair mechanisms, this treatment helps restore healthier and more balanced skin over time.

services.description:
A subtle brow lift using anti-wrinkle injections is one of the most refined ways to restore a fresher, more lifted appearance to the upper face.

By carefully relaxing specific muscles that pull the brows down, we allow the natural lifting muscles to elevate the brow position. The result is a softly lifted, more open eye area — without looking frozen or overdone.

At EGP Aesthetics, we approach every brow lift with precision and balance. The goal is not to change your expression, but to restore lightness, symmetry, and that well-rested look.

This treatment is particularly effective for:
	•	Mild to moderate brow heaviness
	•	Hooded upper eyelids
	•	A tired or “closed” eye appearance
	•	Early signs of upper face ageing

The outcome is elegant, natural, and tailored to your facial structure.
We believe in regeneration over exaggeration.
A well-executed brow lift should never be obvious — only noticeable in how refreshed you look.

Less heaviness.
More light.
More you.

services.name: Melasma Treatment
services.description:
Advanced Regenerative Treatment for Melasma and Skin Pigmentation

Melasma is a common form of hyperpigmentation that appears as brown or greyish patches on the skin, most often affecting the cheeks, forehead, upper lip and chin. It is typically caused by an overproduction of melanin, the pigment responsible for skin colour.

Melasma can be triggered by several factors, including sun exposure, hormonal changes, pregnancy, stress, inflammation or disruption of the skin barrier. Because melasma develops deeper within the skin, it can be particularly challenging to treat and often requires a specialised and carefully structured treatment protocol.

At our London aesthetic clinic, we offer an advanced melasma treatment combining PRP (platelet-rich plasma), autologous exosome therapy and targeted mesotherapy designed to gradually reduce pigmentation while improving the overall health and resilience of the skin.

As a clinic specialising in regenerative aesthetic medicine, our focus is on restoring the skin’s natural balance and supporting long-term skin regeneration rather than using aggressive treatments that may worsen pigmentation.
services.details:
Melasma requires a carefully designed treatment protocol, as the condition can vary significantly depending on the depth of pigmentation and the individual characteristics of the skin.

Our regenerative melasma treatment begins with PRP therapy, obtained from the patient’s own blood. PRP contains powerful growth factors that help stimulate skin repair, support collagen production and improve the overall function of the skin.

PRP is combined with autologous exosomes, which are biological signalling molecules that enhance cellular communication and help accelerate skin regeneration.

To further target pigmentation, this regenerative treatment may also include specialised mesotherapy solutions designed specifically to help regulate melanin production and improve skin clarity.

This combined approach helps:

• support natural skin regeneration
• improve skin barrier function
• gradually reduce pigmentation
• stimulate collagen and skin repair
• restore healthier skin balance

Melasma treatment is not a one-off procedure. Because pigmentation develops gradually within the skin, treatment usually requires a series of sessions depending on the depth and severity of melasma.

Your practitioner will perform a thorough consultation and design a personalised treatment protocol, which may involve multiple sessions spaced over time in order to achieve the safest and most effective results.

This regenerative approach is considered one of the most gentle, safe and long-term strategies for treating melasma, as it supports the skin rather than aggressively damaging it.

services.name: Crow's Feet Treatment
services.description:
Smooth Wrinkles Around the Eyes with Natural-Looking Results

Crow’s feet are the fine lines and wrinkles that appear at the outer corners of the eyes. These lines develop over time due to repeated facial expressions such as smiling and squinting, as well as the natural ageing process and gradual loss of skin elasticity.

Although crow’s feet are a natural part of facial expression, they can become more noticeable with time, creating a tired or aged appearance around the eyes.

At our London aesthetic clinic, we offer advanced crow’s feet treatment using targeted anti-wrinkle injections (neuromodulators) designed to relax the muscles responsible for these expression lines.

By carefully administering small, precise doses of neuromodulator injections, we can soften the appearance of crow’s feet while maintaining natural facial movement and expression.

This treatment helps create a smoother, fresher and more youthful appearance in the eye area.
services.details:
Crow’s feet develop as a result of repeated contraction of the orbicularis oculi muscle, which surrounds the eyes and is responsible for facial expressions such as smiling and squinting.

Anti-wrinkle injections work by temporarily relaxing the specific muscles responsible for these expression lines. By reducing muscle activity in this area, the skin becomes smoother and the wrinkles gradually soften.

The treatment involves precise micro-injections of a neuromodulator placed strategically around the outer corners of the eyes.

The procedure is quick and minimally invasive, typically taking only a few minutes to perform.

Results usually begin to appear within 3 to 5 days, with full results visible after approximately 10 to 14 days.

The effects typically last 3 to 4 months, after which maintenance treatments may be recommended to maintain optimal results.

Each treatment is personalised according to the individual facial anatomy to ensure natural-looking rejuvenation without affecting normal facial expressions.

Active acne is a common skin condition that can cause inflammation, breakouts, congestion and imbalance in the skin. It often appears as blackheads, whiteheads, inflamed spots and oily or congested skin, particularly on the face.

At our London aesthetic clinic, we offer an advanced female hair loss treatment combining PRP (platelet-rich plasma) therapy with specialised hair growth mesotherapy designed to stimulate hair follicles, improve scalp health and support natural hair regeneration.

This regenerative approach helps strengthen weakened hair follicles, improve scalp circulation and encourage healthier hair growth over time.

services.name: Under Eye Hollow Treatment
services.description:
Under eye hollowness is a common concern that can make the face appear tired, aged or less vibrant. It is often caused by volume loss, thinning skin, reduced collagen production or genetic factors affecting the delicate under-eye area.

At our London aesthetic clinic, we offer a specialised Under Eye Hollowness Treatment using our Signature 3-Step regenerative protocol, designed to improve skin quality, restore hydration and gently correct hollow areas under the eyes.

This advanced treatment combines carefully selected regenerative and injectable solutions that work together to improve skin texture, restore volume, soften fine lines and create a fresher, more rested appearance.

The goal of this treatment is not only to address hollowing, but also to improve the overall health and quality of the skin around the eyes.
services.details:
The under-eye area is extremely delicate and requires a precise and carefully structured treatment protocol.

Our clinic has developed a Signature 3-Step Under Eye Treatment designed to target multiple levels of the skin in order to improve both skin quality and under-eye hollowness.

The treatment combines three complementary components:

• Polynucleotides – regenerative molecules that help stimulate tissue repair, improve skin elasticity and support collagen production. They help strengthen the skin structure and improve the overall quality of the under-eye skin.

• NCTF HA135 – an advanced revitalising injectable formula that combines hyaluronic acid with a complex of vitamins, amino acids, antioxidants and essential nutrients. It helps improve hydration, skin vitality and cellular regeneration in the delicate under-eye area.

• A specialised mesofiller formula – a very soft and highly adaptable filler specifically selected for the under-eye area. This formula is designed to integrate smoothly into the tissue and adapt beautifully to one of the most delicate areas of the face, helping to soften hollowness while maintaining a natural-looking result.

This combined protocol allows us to treat the under-eye area on multiple levels, helping to improve hydration, regeneration, skin quality and subtle volume support.

Depending on the starting condition of the skin and the degree of hollowness, treatment is typically performed as a series of sessions in order to achieve optimal results.

During the consultation, your practitioner will assess the under-eye area and design a personalised treatment plan tailored to your facial anatomy and aesthetic goals.

services.name: Frown Lines Treatment
services.description:
Frown lines, also known as glabellar lines, are the vertical wrinkles that appear between the eyebrows. These lines develop over time due to repeated facial expressions such as frowning, concentrating or squinting, as well as the natural ageing process and gradual loss of skin elasticity.

As these muscles contract repeatedly, the skin in this area begins to form deeper lines, which may create a tired, stressed or aged appearance.

At our London aesthetic clinic, we offer advanced anti-wrinkle injections using neurotoxins designed to relax the muscles responsible for frown lines while preserving natural facial expression.

This treatment helps soften existing lines and prevent them from becoming deeper over time, creating a smoother and more refreshed appearance.
services.details:
Frown lines develop primarily due to the activity of the corrugator and procerus muscles, which are responsible for drawing the eyebrows together when we frown or concentrate.

Anti-wrinkle injections with neuromodulators (neurotoxins) work by temporarily relaxing these muscles, reducing the repeated movements that cause the lines to form.

The treatment involves precise micro-injections placed in specific points between the eyebrows, allowing the muscles to relax and the skin above them to appear smoother.

The procedure is quick and minimally invasive, typically taking only a few minutes to perform.

Results usually begin to appear within 3 to 5 days, with full results visible after approximately 10 to 14 days.

The effects typically last 3 to 4 months, after which maintenance treatments may be recommended to maintain optimal results.

Each treatment is carefully tailored to the patient’s facial anatomy in order to achieve natural-looking results while preserving facial expression.
benefits: Anti-wrinkle injections for frown lines provide both cosmetic and preventative benefits.  Key benefits include:  • Softens vertical frown lines between the eyebrows • Creates a smoother and more relaxed facial appearance • Prevents deeper wrinkles from developing over time • Maintains natural facial expression • Quick and minimally invasive treatment • No surgery required • Minimal recovery time • Personalised treatment approach  Many patients also choose this treatment as a preventative anti-ageing procedure, helping to slow the formation of deeper lines in the glabellar area.

services.name: EXOSOMES
services.description:
Autologous Exosomes Therapy represents one of the most advanced approaches in modern regenerative aesthetics. This innovative treatment works with powerful biological messengers naturally derived from your own cells, helping to support skin regeneration, improve tissue quality, and restore a healthier, more youthful skin environment.

At EGP Aesthetics, we use some of the most advanced preparation technologies currently available in regenerative medicine. Our protocol combines MetaCell Technology (MCT) with the T-Lab Exomine system, allowing us to obtain highly refined regenerative components from the patient’s own blood.

Through specialised processing and filtration methods, these technologies isolate concentrated regenerative factors and exosome-rich cellular signals that play a key role in skin repair and cellular communication.

When delivered into the skin, these biological signals help to stimulate natural regeneration processes within the tissue. The treatment supports:

• improved skin texture and firmness
• enhanced hydration and elasticity
• brighter and more even skin tone
• reduction in the appearance of fine lines
• overall improvement in skin quality

Because the treatment uses your own biological material, it is highly biocompatible and designed to work in harmony with the body’s natural regenerative mechanisms.

Autologous Exosomes Therapy is particularly suitable for clients seeking advanced skin rejuvenation without synthetic fillers, focusing instead on improving the quality and vitality of the skin itself.

services.name: Barcode lines around lips
services.description:
Barcode lines, also known as vertical lip lines or smoker’s lines, are the fine wrinkles that develop around the lips over time. These lines can appear due to natural ageing, repetitive lip movements, reduced collagen production and gradual loss of skin elasticity.

Because the skin around the mouth is very delicate and constantly active, these lines may become more noticeable with time and may affect the smooth appearance of the lip area.

At our London aesthetic clinic, we offer an advanced barcode lines treatment protocol designed to smooth vertical lip lines, improve skin quality and restore a softer, more youthful appearance around the lips.

This treatment uses a combination approach, carefully addressing the skin surface, skin texture and fine wrinkles to achieve natural-looking results while preserving natural lip movement.
services.details:
The area around the lips has a unique anatomical structure and requires a specialised treatment protocol.

Our approach combines several carefully selected techniques to address barcode lines at different levels of the skin.

The treatment may include:

• Dermabrasion – a controlled resurfacing technique that helps refine the skin surface and improve the appearance of fine lines.

• A targeted skin peel – used to gently exfoliate the skin and stimulate cellular renewal, helping to improve skin texture and prepare the skin for the next treatment steps.

• A specialised mesofiller formula – a soft and adaptable injectable filler designed specifically for delicate areas such as the lip contour. This helps to precisely fill the fine vertical lines without creating bulk or affecting natural lip shape.

• Micro-droplets of neurotoxin (in selected cases) – small doses may be used to gently relax the muscles around the mouth, helping to soften repetitive movements that contribute to these lines.

Because the severity of barcode lines varies from person to person, the exact combination of techniques is tailored during consultation.

In many cases, visible improvement can already be achieved after a single treatment, although additional treatments may sometimes be recommended depending on the depth of the lines and the skin condition.

services.description:
Polynucleotides are an injectable treatment that stimulates collagen and elastin production to improve skin quality, reduce fine lines, scarring, and pigmentation, making it effective for anti-aging. Safe for all skin types, this treatment is extremely beneficial for  visibly rejuvenating face, under-eye area but can also be used on the neck and hands.
Polynucleotides are protein molecules found in DNA that guide cell functions, including collagen and elastin production, which decrease with age. In aesthetic treatments, polynucleotides derived from salmon or trout DNA are injected into the skin to boost cell turnover and rejuvenation.
Safe, effective and minimal downtime.

Using five carefully selected injection points, our highly trained practitioners are able to lift, contour and rebalance the face while preserving its natural character. The goal is not to change your features, but to enhance them — creating a rested, elegant and naturally lifted appearance.

services.description:
Profhilo® is an advanced injectable treatment designed to improve skin quality, hydration and firmness by stimulating the skin’s natural regenerative processes. Unlike traditional dermal fillers, Profhilo® does not add volume or change facial structure. Instead, it works by remodelling the skin from within, helping to restore elasticity, hydration and overall skin vitality.

Profhilo® contains one of the highest concentrations of pure hyaluronic acid available in aesthetic medicine. Through a unique stabilisation process, the hyaluronic acid spreads smoothly within the skin, stimulating the production of collagen and elastin, two essential components responsible for maintaining firm, youthful-looking skin.

The treatment is particularly effective for addressing skin laxity, dehydration and early signs of ageing, leaving the skin smoother, firmer and more radiant. Profhilo® is widely known for creating a subtle lifting and tightening effect, while maintaining a completely natural appearance.

At EGP Aesthetics, Profhilo® is used to improve overall skin quality and restore a healthy glow, making it a popular choice for clients who want skin rejuvenation without changing their facial features.

Profhilo® can be used on several areas of the body, including:

• Face
• Neck
• Décolletage
• Hands
• Abdomen and areas with skin laxity

services.description:
Sculptra® is an advanced injectable treatment designed to gradually restore facial volume and improve skin quality by stimulating the body’s natural collagen production. Unlike traditional dermal fillers that provide immediate volume, Sculptra® works more subtly by encouraging the skin to rebuild its own structural support over time.

The treatment contains poly-L-lactic acid (PLLA), a well-established biostimulatory ingredient that helps activate collagen synthesis within the deeper layers of the skin. As collagen levels gradually increase, the skin becomes firmer, smoother and more resilient, with improved texture and elasticity.

Sculptra® is particularly effective for addressing volume loss, skin laxity and changes in facial structure associated with ageing. Rather than creating a “filled” look, the treatment focuses on restoring the skin’s underlying framework, producing a refreshed and natural-looking result.
At EGP Aesthetics, Sculptra® is performed by highly trained practitioners who carefully assess facial structure and ageing patterns to achieve balanced, subtle and elegant outcomes.
This treatment is ideal for clients seeking long-term collagen stimulation and progressive facial rejuvenation.

Unlike traditional dermal fillers, skin boosters work by delivering hyaluronic acid and other regenerative ingredients directly into the skin to deeply hydrate, stimulate collagen production, and improve skin texture and elasticity.

These treatments are ideal for clients who would like to restore a healthy glow, improve firmness and hydration, and soften fine lines while maintaining completely natural facial movement.

services.name: Signature Deep Cleansing Facial
services.description:
Our Signature Deep Cleansing Facial is one of the most effective treatments for restoring clear, balanced and healthy-looking skin. Designed to deeply purify the pores while improving overall skin texture, this treatment is ideal for clients experiencing congestion, blackheads, milia or dull skin.

At EGP Aesthetics, this facial follows a carefully structured protocol that focuses on thorough cleansing, professional extractions and skin renewal, leaving the skin visibly clearer, smoother and refreshed.

The treatment begins with dermabrasion to gently exfoliate the surface of the skin and remove dead skin cells. This is followed by a steam treatment, which helps to soften the skin and open the pores, preparing them for deep cleansing.

Once the skin is properly prepared, we perform a comprehensive pore cleansing, including the removal of milia, blackheads and whiteheads. Extractions are performed using professional techniques and are supported by an ultrasonic spatula, which helps loosen impurities from the pores while remaining gentle on the skin.

To further purify and calm the skin after extractions, we use a high-frequency device (Téolite high-frequency machine). This step helps to disinfect the skin, reduce bacteria and support faster recovery, leaving the skin clearer and more balanced.

A light chemical peel is then applied, carefully selected according to the skin’s needs. This step helps to further refine the pores, improve skin texture and provide an additional purifying and sterilising effect.

The treatment continues with the application of targeted serums, combined with a relaxing facial massage to support deeper penetration of active ingredients and stimulate circulation. A customised mask is then applied to soothe, hydrate and rebalance the skin.

The facial is completed with professional post-treatment serums and creams, leaving the skin clean, calm and visibly revitalised.
